# Aura Knowledge

> Focused essays for humans, backed by compact agent-auditable research packets.

## Primary Pages
- [Home](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/)
- [Roadmap](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/roadmap/)
- [Agent Entry](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/)
- [Knowledge Graph](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/graph/)

## Articles
- [The Future of Publishing Is Agent-Auditable Research](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/agent-auditable-research/)

## Agent Artifacts
- [Agent Index JSON](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/index.json)
- [Agent Index JSONL](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/index.jsonl)
- [Graph Nodes](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/graph/nodes.json)
- [Graph Edges](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/graph/edges.json)
- [awesome-llm-apps-roadmap roadmap JSON](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/roadmap/awesome-llm-apps-roadmap.json)
- [agent-auditable-research JSON](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/articles/agent-auditable-research.json)
- [agent-auditable-research Markdown](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/articles/agent-auditable-research.md)

## Use
Use article packets as the retrieval unit. Treat maturity values as uncertainty markers. Prefer claim IDs and source IDs over inferred citations.
